description: Agents currently have to run 'bl create --help' to figure out how to file tasks because SKILL.md only covers the claim->review workflow. Add a section (or table row) documenting 'bl create TITLE [-d DESCRIPTION] [-p PRIORITY] [-t TYPE] [--parent ID] [--dep ID] [--tag TAG]' so agents can file tasks without a help round-trip.
title: SKILL.md: document bl create for agents
